observations: The pinned Lemonade image pull/build started through Podman-backed Compose.
The initial command had no build timeout and was terminated by the operator/agent to avoid an unmanaged long-running process.
Ollama reappeared on 127.0.0.1:11434 during the attempt, so Ollama handoff was hardened to stop ordinary ollama processes and wait for the port to clear.
A bounded retry built the pinned image but found the initial command path wrong for v9.1.3; the image uses /opt/lemonade/lemonade-server rather than lemond.

pipeline_result.next_action: Run scripts/advance-pipeline.sh lemonade-runtime-start with bounded build and model-pull timeouts.
